name: chain_how_do_you_all_source_reliable_video_pro
method: How do you all source reliable video production for SaaS marketing when you are still small? Small team in Denver running a SaaS that automates customer success workflows for mid sized B2B companies.

stages.task: Scrape r/SaaS, r/startups, r/smallbusiness, Twitter for keywords: 'video production SaaS', 'explainer video startup', 'iMovie look dated', 'motion graphics budget'
Filter for B2B SaaS companies sub-50 employees, no agency mention, budget signals under $5K, extract company name + product description + founder contact
Use Remotion to generate 30-second sample explainer matching their product description, host on surge.sh
Send personalized cold outreach via Reddit DM or email with sample video link, pricing $500-1500/video
